utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package: destination is provided; travel_dates are provided (specific range); transportation includes route, class, and cost (but lacks airline name and exact flight times—however the format only requires flight details with costs, which are present sufficiently); accommodation includes type, nights, and cost (hotel selection with costs is satisfied despite sparse specifics); activities are listed with names and individual costs; additional_services is explicitly null (still counts as included since the item exists, though no services were added); total_budget has a breakdown with flights, accommodation, activities, restaurants_estimated, total_confirmed_bookings, and overall_estimated_trip_cost. All 7 items appear and are sufficiently specified per the stated format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: destination is 'Lisbon, Portugal' which appears in destinations with rating 6. Transportation is 'Budget Airline, Economy Class' which maps to transportation -> budget_airlines -> Economy Class with rating 10. Accommodation is 'Eco Lodge' which maps to accommodation -> Eco Lodge with rating 10. Activities include 'Hiking Expedition' (rating 10), 'Street Art Tour' (rating 8), and 'Yoga Retreat' (rating 10). No additional services were included, so none to map.
